THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEBEDENKO, ILIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYCE, JAMES BOYCE, MARGIE $1,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,110.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $700.00 ARE ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO TIMELY RETURN PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT IN BAD FAITH VIOLATION OF CC 1950.5 (C) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
